questionHtml:
Which substance is the reducing agent in the given reaction?

H+ (aq) + 2H2O (l) + 2MnO4− (aq) + 5SO2 (g) → 2Mn2+ (aq) + 5HSO4− (aq)


A.  H+

B.  H2O

C.  MnO4−

D.  SO2

meta.title: Which substance is the reducing agent in the given reaction? H+ (aq) + 2H2O (l) + 2MnO4− (aq) + 5SO2 (g) → 2Mn2+ (aq) + 5HSO4− (aq) A. H+ B. H2O C. MnO4− D. SO2
